specification.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: i3-2130
  • Memory: 6 GB RAM
  • Graphics: If you lower the texture quality to half/quarter and disable some effects, it will make the UI look worse but will make it much smooth of an expirence on weaker hardware. Disabling/enabling post processing and shadow quality has no real impact on performance. Lowering texture quality will make it where it is possible to get 60 FPS with hardware with around 2-3 GBs of VRAM.
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
  • Additional Notes: I would highly recomend an SSD if you don't want to deal with load times.
specification.recommended:

  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 11
  • Processor: AMD Ryzen 4300g
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Any GPU with at least 4 GBs of VRAM for 60 FPS on default settings. 8+ would be the smoothest.
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Any
  • Additional Notes: SSD is required for better loading times.
